input_text: Most bears are big. Eve kept the milk in the fridge. The cat slept on the velvet sofa. John is a father of Mike or Mary. The letter was written in June. Riga is not in Estonia. Sandra travelled to the kitchen. Anna handed a key to Mark. Dole was defeated by Clinton. The length of Emajogi is 80 kilometers. The white mouse is strong. Some elephants are not animals?
